price: Sie glauben nicht eher daran, bis sie die schmerzhafte Strafe sehen
arabic: لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ بِهِۦ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُاْ ٱلۡعَذَابَ ٱلۡأَلِيمَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: lā yu'minūna bihi ḥattā yarawū al-ʿadhāba al-alīma
